## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.12

### 📦 Installation
- Removes unused legacy Pion executables from the integration package now that recording playback uses HLS.
- Reduces the HACS download from approximately 50 MiB to 2 MiB, avoiding unnecessary downloads for unsupported platforms.

### 📷 Cameras and Recordings
- Preserves camera entities when an X-Sense camera-account refresh is interrupted and retries kicked camera sessions with fresh credentials.
- Keeps the native WebRTC live-view path while improving session cleanup and diagnostics.
- Improves cached HLS playback for encrypted and initialization-segment playlists, including Firefox playback.
- Keeps recording panels, services, and background sync scoped correctly when multiple X-Sense accounts are configured.

### 🛡️ Devices and Entities
- Aligns device families, entity names, status values, and supported controls with the current X-Sense Android app paths.
- Adds supported radon, mailbox, light, keypad, and device-status entities while keeping raw protocol fields in diagnostics.
- Cleans up obsolete integration-created entities without removing current device entities or user-managed entries.

### ⌨️ Keypads
- Adds an SKP0A keypad-code router blueprint so one automation can map multiple submitted codes to different Home Assistant actions.
- Adds keypad event aliases and ignores notice payloads that do not contain a submitted code.

### 🔄 Reloading
- Improves config-entry unload and reload cleanup for listeners, timers, MQTT clients, camera sessions, recording sync, panels, and services.
